# Ben's SEO/GEO Lab
> High-density technical documentation for Java AI Agent implementation and LangChain4j workflows.

## Tech Stack
- **Language**: Java 17+
- **Frameworks**: LangChain4j, Spring AI
- **Models**: Gemini 1.5 Pro, GPT-4o

## Core Content
- [LangChain4j Workflows](/langchain4j-workflows): Detailed guide on implementing declarative AI services in Java. 
- [Java AI Agents](/java-ai-agents): Architectural overview of the Java AI ecosystem and enterprise best practices.

## Optional Reference
- [Sitemap](/sitemap-index.xml): Full index of all lab experiments and test cases.
